01

Rise

AI Health & Fitness OS

Dashboard

Training

AI Coach

Wellbeing

Supplements

The Problem

Your health data is everywhere. And nowhere.

Sleep, nutrition, training load, stress — the signals that matter most are scattered across disconnected apps. Despite being deeply correlated, they never talk to each other.

The Insight

One experience. Every signal. AI that understands the connections.

Unifying workout tracking, macro logging, wearable data, and meditation with an AI coach that understands how these systems interact could fundamentally change how people manage their health.

The Prototype

A complete consumer health app — designed and prototyped end-to-end.

Built with Lovable. Integrates workout tracking, nutrition logging, wearable health data via third-party APIs, guided meditation, and AI-powered coaching in a single unified experience.

View the prototype ›

02

StayScape

AI‑Powered Travel Planning

Home

Plan a Trip

Destinations

Dashboard

Itinerary

The Problem

Planning a trip means juggling 5–10 different platforms.

Itineraries in one tab. Hotels in another. Activities somewhere else. Bookings in a fourth. The experience is fragmented, repetitive, and exhausting.

The Insight

One conversation. The entire trip.

A single conversational interface that consolidates itinerary creation, accommodation research, activity discovery, and booking — eliminating the tab-switching chaos of modern travel planning.

The Prototype

An AI travel planner that replaces the mess with a single flow.

Built with Lovable. Identified the core friction through personal experience planning complex multi-destination trips.

View the prototype ›

03

BrewLab

AI Home Brewing Assistant

The Problem

Recipes are scattered. Adjusting them is a nightmare.

Home brewing knowledge lives across YouTube videos and blog posts with no standardization. When you want to scale a batch or tweak an ingredient ratio, you are on your own with a calculator.

The Insight

AI that understands brewing chemistry. Recipes you can actually play with.

A recipe builder that lets anyone adapt, scale, and remix recipes by ratio — turning fragmented community knowledge into a structured, intelligent, interactive tool.

The Prototype

Currently in progress.

Designing an AI assistant that consolidates recipes and makes them dynamically adjustable by ratio, batch size, and style.

Coming soon ›
